picks.quote: Why Silva keeps Valentina up at night? ... Age curve. Chevchenko is 37. Her Prime's GPS signal may be fading. Silva is 26 and riding a 13 fight streak

Vulk's Achilles heel, pocket firefights. Every knockdown on his ledger happened inside phone booth range... I'll retire before I fight him. Folk half joked... then looked away like someone who just glimpsed a spoiler for his own career.
